evals.prompt: Create a skill for rotating PDF files
evals.expected_output: A new skill directory with SKILL.md containing instructions for PDF rotation, scripts/rotate_pdf.py for the rotation logic, and proper frontmatter

evals.prompt: I want to improve my existing bigquery skill to add better error handling
evals.expected_output: Updated SKILL.md with improved error handling guidance, possibly new reference files for error patterns, and updated evals to test the improvements

evals.prompt: Test my docx-editor skill to see if it's working correctly
evals.expected_output: Test cases run with-skill and baseline, timing data captured, eval viewer generated showing comparison results
